title: fix: Reconciliation export fails for end-of-day timezone offsets
body: When exporting reconciliation at month-end, offsets near DST transitions cause missing rows. Steps to reproduce: 1) Set branch timezone to 'America/New_York' 2) Run month-end export for 2023-11-30 to 2023-12-01 3) Observe missing reconciled rows. Suggested investigation: normalize to UTC before grouping.

comments.body: I can reproduce — likely caused by naive datetime usage in export.
Working on a patch that normalizes timestamps to UTC before aggregation.

title: perf: Ledger query slow for December batch imports
body: Large December batch imports (100k+ rows) cause ledger query latency spikes exceeding 2s per request. Profiling shows heavy GROUP BY on unindexed columns. Proposed fix: add composite index and paginate aggregation.

comments.body: Tagging DB: this looks like missing index on (branch_id, posting_date).
Agree — will test adding index in a staging snapshot.

title: docs: Clarify year-end closing procedure for 2023
body: The README mentions year-end closing but lacks steps for ledger rollovers in 2023. Add explicit commands, expected backup locations, and common pitfalls (e.g., timezone, fiscal vs calendar year).

comments.body: I can draft the README updates and include example commands.
Please include a checklist for backups and migration steps.
